description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a glossy red exterior and metallic highlights. The can features bold, white, vertically oriented text and a large, stylized white graphic element that wraps partially around the body. The top of the can is metallic gray with a standard pull tab opening mechanism. The label includes detailed text, such as '450ML' and other smaller inscriptions, indicating its contents and volume. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible dents or condensation. The overall appearance is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display or casual consumption in urban environments.
description: A glossy red aluminum can with bold white graphics and a metallic pull tab top, featuring detailed text and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the '450ML' marking and the most prominent white text and graphic elements on the red can.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the can, showing more of the curved white graphic and less text detail.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to display a large white graphic with minimal text, emphasizing the smooth, reflective red surface.
description_view_3: The back view reveals smaller white text, including 'PROJECT MAX FOR FLIGHT SODA', and a barcode, with less prominent graphics.
attribute_graphic_design: The can features a bold, modern design with a glossy red background, large white stylized graphics, and vertically oriented sans-serif text. The layout is clean and contemporary, with minimal clutter and high contrast between the text and background.
